message:
✨ Add real GitOps sync with drift detection

- Add GitOps backend handler with MCP + kubectl fallback
- Implement 3-phase sync flow: Detection → Plan → Execute
- Add kubeconfig file watcher for real-time config updates
- Improve drift detection UI with resource kind icons
- Add clearer labeling for namespace, repo, and path
- Enable CORS for local development testing
- Add fsnotify for file watching

The sync dialog now shows:
- Real drift detection via kubectl diff
- Resource-specific icons (Deployments, CRDs, Services, etc.)
- Sync plan before execution
- Console output with token counting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
